events.output: Problem defined: orchestrator/worker behaviors formally specified in meta/skills/ (execute-activity v2.0.0, orchestrate-workflow v4.0.0) but not followed. Root cause identified as discoverability gap — get_skills does not return universal meta-skills.

Classified as Specific Problem (Cause Known). Root cause: execute-activity universal skill not surfaced via get_skills API. orchestrate-workflow dispatch protocol doesn't instruct worker to load execute-activity.
Recommended skip-optional; user selected full-workflow (elicitation + research).
Created 02-design-philosophy.md with problem statement, classification, workflow path, constraints, and success criteria. Updated after reconciliation with revised problem understanding.
Identified 7 assumptions across Problem Interpretation, Complexity Assessment, Scope Boundary, and Workflow Path categories.
Created 02-assumptions-log.md with 7 initial assumptions (4 code-analyzable, 3 not code-resolvable).

Convergence in 1 iteration. 2 invalidated (skills DO exist), 2 validated (schema supports protocol, no role restrictions), 1 partially validated (get_skills gap), 1 newly surfaced (A-02-08 discoverability gap). 3 remaining open (stakeholder-dependent).
